title: Senior Financial Analyst - IndusInd Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - IndusInd Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
